payload.SubTitle: How to reach CUK ?
payload.ShortDescription:
The Central University of Kashmir is located in District Ganderbal of the Union Territory of Jammu & Kashmir (J&K). The university is spread across four different campuses in the district viz:

  1. Main Campus Tulmulla.
  2. Science Campus Nunar.
  3. Arts Campus Duderhama.
  4. Green Campus Duderhama.
payload.LongDescription:
LAND ROUTES TO OUR CAMPUSES:

Tulmulla Campus:  

Lal-Chowk> Khanyar >Nowhatta > Soura > Nagbal > Beehama> Tulmulla.

Green Campus:

Lal-Chowk > Khanyar > Nowhatta > Soura > Nagbal > Beehama > Green Campus.

Science Campus: 

Lal-Chowk >  Khanyar > Nowhatta > Soura > Nagbal > Beehama > Nunar.

Arts Campus:

LalChowk > Khanyar > Nowhatta > Soura > Nagbal > Beehama > Dudrhama.
